issues.title: File upload fails silently for files over 100MB
issues.description: When uploading files larger than 100MB, the progress bar reaches 100% but the file never appears in the user's storage. No error message is shown.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Log in to CloudSync Pro
2. Navigate to file upload
3. Select a file > 100MB
4. Click upload
5. Wait for progress bar to complete
issues.expected_behavior: File should be uploaded and visible in storage dashboard.
issues.actual_behavior: Progress bar completes but file is not saved. No error message displayed.

comments.text: Confirmed this is a backend timeout issue. The upload proxy has a 60s timeout which isn't enough for large files.
Investigating chunked upload as a fix. Should resolve the timeout and add resume capability.

issues.title: Login button unresponsive on mobile Safari
issues.description: Tapping the login button on iOS Safari requires two taps to register. First tap appears to focus the element, second tap triggers the action.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Open app on iOS Safari
2. Navigate to login page
3. Tap login button
issues.expected_behavior: Login modal should open on first tap.
issues.actual_behavior: Requires two taps. First tap only focuses the button.

comments.text: This might be related to the CSS :hover state causing a delay on touch devices.

issues.title: Dashboard charts don't render on Firefox 121
issues.description: The analytics dashboard shows blank areas where charts should be. Console shows SVG rendering errors related to clip-path.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Open app in Firefox 121
2. Navigate to Dashboard
3. Observe blank chart areas
issues.expected_behavior: Charts render correctly as they do in Chrome/Safari.
issues.actual_behavior: Blank white rectangles where charts should be.

issues.title: Shared folder permissions not syncing across devices
issues.description: When a user changes sharing permissions on Device A, Device B continues to use stale permissions until the app is restarted.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Share a folder with another user on Device A
2. Change permission from 'view' to 'edit' on Device A
3. Check permissions on Device B without restarting
issues.expected_behavior: Permission change should propagate within 30 seconds.
issues.actual_behavior: Stale permissions persist until app restart.

comments.text: Root cause: WebSocket reconnection wasn't re-subscribing to permission change events.

issues.title: Memory leak in real-time collaboration editor
issues.description: The collaborative text editor gradually consumes more memory over time. After ~2 hours of use, the tab consumes over 2GB of RAM.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Open a shared document
2. Make edits continuously for 2+ hours
3. Monitor memory usage in Chrome DevTools
issues.expected_behavior: Memory usage should remain stable under 500MB.
issues.actual_behavior: Memory grows linearly, reaching 2GB+ after 2 hours.

comments.text: Heap snapshot analysis shows CRDT operation log is never garbage collected. Need to implement compaction.

issues.title: Search results include deleted files
issues.description: The global search feature returns results from files that have been moved to trash but not permanently deleted.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Create a file with unique content
2. Move file to trash
3. Search for the unique content
issues.expected_behavior: Trashed files should not appear in search results.
issues.actual_behavior: Trashed files appear in search results with no indication they are deleted.

issues.title: Notification preferences reset after logout
issues.description: User notification preferences (email digest frequency, push notification settings) are reset to defaults after logging out and back in.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Change notification preferences
2. Log out
3. Log back in
4. Check notification preferences

issues.title: PDF preview renders blank pages for password-protected files
issues.description: When previewing a password-protected PDF, the viewer shows blank pages instead of prompting for the password.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Upload a password-protected PDF
2. Click to preview
issues.expected_behavior: Should prompt for password before rendering.
issues.actual_behavior: Shows blank white pages with no password prompt.

issues.title: Rate limiter blocks legitimate batch API requests
issues.description: The API rate limiter treats batch operations (e.g., moving 50 files at once) as individual requests, causing legitimate operations to be rate-limited.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Select 50+ files
2. Move all to a new folder
3. Observe 429 errors after ~20 files
issues.expected_behavior: Batch operations should count as a single logical request.
issues.actual_behavior: Each file move counts separately, hitting the 30 req/min limit.

comments.text: Implementing a batch endpoint that wraps multiple operations in a single request.

issues.title: Drag and drop upload doesn't work in Electron wrapper
issues.description: The drag-and-drop file upload zone doesn't respond to drop events when running the app through the Electron desktop wrapper.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Open desktop app (Electron)
2. Try to drag a file onto the upload zone
issues.expected_behavior: File should be accepted and upload should start.
issues.actual_behavior: Drop zone doesn't highlight and file is not accepted.

comments.text: Fixed by updating Electron's webPreferences to not block drag events.

issues.title: Keyboard shortcuts conflict with OS-level shortcuts on Linux
issues.description: Several app keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+D for duplicate, Ctrl+H for history) conflict with Linux desktop environment shortcuts, causing unexpected behavior.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Open app on Ubuntu with GNOME
2. Press Ctrl+D (app: duplicate, GNOME: bookmark)
3. Observe GNOME bookmark dialog appears instead
issues.expected_behavior: App shortcuts should not conflict with common OS shortcuts.
issues.actual_behavior: OS shortcuts take priority, preventing app functionality.

issues.title: Two-factor auth backup codes not generating properly
issues.description: When generating backup codes for 2FA, occasionally only 5 codes are generated instead of the expected 10. The missing codes are replaced with empty strings.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Enable 2FA
2. Generate backup codes
3. Count the valid codes (repeat several times to reproduce)
issues.expected_behavior: 10 unique backup codes should be generated.
issues.actual_behavior: Sometimes only 5 valid codes, rest are empty strings.

comments.text: Race condition in the code generation loop. Fixed with proper async/await handling.

issues.title: Dark mode support
issues.description: Users have requested a dark theme for the application to reduce eye strain during nighttime use and improve accessibility.
issues.use_case: Users working in low-light environments experience eye strain with the current all-white UI. Developers and power users who spend hours in the app are particularly affected.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [x] All pages render correctly in dark mode
- [x] User preference is persisted
- [ ] System preference is respected by default
- [ ] Smooth transition animation between modes

comments.text: Dark mode design mockups approved. Using CSS custom properties for the color system.

issues.title: Real-time collaborative editing
issues.description: Allow multiple users to edit the same document simultaneously with live cursors and conflict resolution.
issues.use_case: Teams working on shared documents need to see each other's changes in real time without having to refresh or manually merge changes.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Multiple cursors visible in real time
- [ ] Automatic conflict resolution using CRDT
- [ ] Presence indicators showing who is viewing/editing
- [ ] Offline support with sync on reconnect
- [ ] Undo/redo works correctly in collaborative mode

comments.text: Evaluating Yjs vs Automerge for the CRDT implementation. Yjs has better ecosystem support.
Prototype with Yjs is working. Performance is good for documents up to 10MB.

issues.title: End-to-end encryption for shared files
issues.description: Implement client-side encryption so that files are encrypted before leaving the user's device. Server never sees plaintext data.
issues.use_case: Enterprise customers and privacy-conscious users need assurance that their files cannot be accessed by anyone, including the service provider.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Files encrypted with AES-256-GCM before upload
- [ ] Key management using user's master password
- [ ] Sharing encrypted files generates ephemeral keys
- [ ] Zero-knowledge proof that server cannot decrypt
- [ ] Performance: < 10% overhead for encryption/decryption

issues.title: Mobile app (iOS and Android)
issues.description: Native mobile applications for iOS and Android with full sync capabilities and offline support.
issues.use_case: Users need access to their files and collaborative features from mobile devices. Currently the web app is usable on mobile but doesn't provide the best experience.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Native iOS app with file browsing and preview
- [ ] Native Android app with file browsing and preview
- [ ] Offline mode with automatic sync
- [ ] Push notifications for collaboration events
- [ ] Camera integration for document scanning

comments.text: Considering React Native vs Flutter. Flutter has better performance but RN allows code sharing with web.

issues.title: Version history and file recovery
issues.description: Allow users to view previous versions of files and restore any previous version. Show a timeline of changes.
issues.use_case: Users accidentally overwrite or delete files and need to recover previous versions. Also useful for tracking who changed what and when.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] View version history for any file
- [ ] Preview any historical version
- [ ] Restore to a previous version
- [ ] Compare two versions side-by-side
- [ ] Configurable retention period (30/90/365 days)

issues.title: Advanced search with filters and full-text indexing
issues.description: Upgrade the search functionality to support full-text search across file contents, with filters for file type, date range, owner, and tags.
issues.use_case: Users with large file collections need powerful search to find documents quickly. Current search only matches file names.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [x] Full-text search across file contents
- [x] Filter by file type, date range, and tags
- [x] Search results show relevant content snippets
- [x] Search suggestions and autocomplete
- [x] Response time < 200ms for most queries

comments.text: Implemented using Tantivy (Rust full-text search engine). Performance exceeds requirements.

issues.title: Webhook integrations for third-party services
issues.description: Allow users to set up webhooks that trigger on file events (upload, delete, share) to integrate with services like Slack, Zapier, and custom endpoints.
issues.use_case: Power users and teams want to automate workflows triggered by file events. For example, auto-posting to Slack when a shared document is updated.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Configure webhook endpoints in settings
- [ ] Select which events trigger the webhook
- [ ] Webhook delivery with retry logic
- [ ] Webhook logs for debugging
- [ ] Pre-built templates for Slack, Discord, Teams

issues.title: Admin dashboard with usage analytics
issues.description: A dedicated admin panel for team/organization admins to view storage usage, active users, sharing analytics, and manage billing.
issues.use_case: Organization admins need visibility into how their team uses CloudSync Pro, including storage quotas, most active users, and sharing patterns.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Storage usage breakdown by user
- [ ] Active user metrics (DAU/WAU/MAU)
- [ ] Sharing analytics
- [ ] Billing management
- [ ] User management (invite, remove, role assignment)

issues.title: AI-powered file organization suggestions
issues.description: Use ML to analyze file contents and metadata to suggest folder structures, auto-tagging, and duplicate detection.
issues.use_case: Users with thousands of files struggle to maintain organized folder structures. AI can suggest better organization and identify duplicates.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Suggest folder moves based on file content similarity
- [ ] Auto-tag files based on content analysis
- [ ] Detect and flag duplicate files
- [ ] Learning from user's organizational patterns
- [ ] Privacy: all analysis happens client-side or with E2E encryption

issues.title: Custom branding for enterprise customers
issues.description: Allow enterprise customers to apply custom branding (logo, colors, domain) to their CloudSync Pro instance.
issues.use_case: Enterprise customers want their employees to see company branding when using CloudSync Pro, reinforcing that it's a sanctioned tool.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Upload custom logo
- [ ] Configure primary and secondary brand colors
- [ ] Custom domain support (files.company.com)
- [ ] Custom email templates with branding
- [ ] White-label option for resellers

issues.title: Optimize file list loading for large directories
issues.description: Directories with 1000+ files take over 5 seconds to load. Implement virtual scrolling and pagination.

comments.text: Implementing react-virtuoso for virtual scrolling. Initial tests show 10x improvement.

issues.title: Improve error messages for API failures
issues.description: Replace generic 'Something went wrong' errors with specific, actionable error messages that help users understand what happened and what to do.

issues.title: Update dependencies to latest versions
issues.description: Audit and update all npm and Cargo dependencies. Ensure no breaking changes and all tests pass.

issues.title: Write integration tests for file sharing flow
issues.description: Create end-to-end integration tests covering the complete file sharing workflow: share, accept, view, revoke.

comments.text: 3 of 8 test scenarios completed. Blocked on setting up test fixtures for multi-user scenarios.
